languages.text: "Конечно... Сомнения гложут меня так долго, но почему? Разве оттого, что я утратил разум, я лишился способности мыслить? Я — генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус, мудрец и алхимик. Омниссия даровал мне знания и способность постигать, и я не смею усомниться. Ибо я — проводник промысла Его, и если я сомневаюсь в себе, то я сомневаюсь в Боге-Машине. Я так сказал".

"Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."
languages.original_text: "Конечно... Сомнения гложут меня так долго, но почему? Разве оттого, что я утратил разум, я лишился способности мыслить? Я — генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус, мудрец и алхимик. Омниссия даровал мне знания и способность постигать, и я не смею усомниться. Ибо я — проводник промысла Его, и если я сомневаюсь в себе, то я сомневаюсь в Боге-Машине. Я так сказал".

The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

languages.text: «Claro... Llevo mucho tiempo atormentado por la duda, pero ¿por qué? ¿Es porque he perdido la cabeza que no puedo pensar? Soy el Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sabio y alquimista. El Omnissiah me ha dado el conocimiento y la capacidad de comprender, y no dudaré. Soy un conducto de sus designios, y dudar de mí mismo es dudar del Dios Máquina. He hablado».
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

traits.locale_text: «Claro... Llevo mucho tiempo atormentado por la duda, pero ¿por qué? ¿Es porque he perdido la cabeza que no puedo pensar? Soy el Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sabio y alquimista. El Omnissiah me ha dado el conocimiento y la capacidad de comprender, y no dudaré. Soy un conducto de sus designios, y dudar de mí mismo es dudar del Dios Máquina. He hablado».

languages.text: “当然……我被疑虑困扰了这么久，可是为什么？是因为我疯了，就失去了思考的能力吗？我是特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯，是贤者与炼金术士。欧姆尼赛亚赐予了我知识和理解的能力，我绝不可心生怀疑。因为我即是祂设计蓝图的导体，我怀疑自己，就是怀疑万机之神。我意已决。”
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

traits.locale_text: “当然……我被疑虑困扰了这么久，可是为什么？是因为我疯了，就失去了思考的能力吗？我是特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯，是贤者与炼金术士。欧姆尼赛亚赐予了我知识和理解的能力，我绝不可心生怀疑。因为我即是祂设计蓝图的导体，我怀疑自己，就是怀疑万机之神。我意已决。”

languages.text: « Bien sûr... Le doute m'assaille depuis si longtemps, mais pourquoi ? Aurais-je perdu ma capacité de réflexion en même temps que mon esprit ? Je suis le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs, sage et alchimiste auquel l'Omnimessie a accordé la connaissance et la faculté de comprendre. Le doute ne m'est pas permis, car j'agis conformément à Ses desseins, et si je doute de moi, je doute du Dieu-Machine. J'ai parlé. »
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

Le doute ne m'est pas permis, car j'agis conformément à Ses desseins, et si je doute de moi, je doute du Dieu-Machine. J'ai parlé. »

languages.text: "Elbette... O kadar uzun zamandır şüphelerle boğuşuyorum ki. Peki neden? Zihinsel melekelerimi kaybettiğim için mi düşünme yeteneğimi yitirdim? Ben âlim ve simyager Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs'um. Hermesih bana irfan ve kavrama yeteneği bahşetti. Şüphe etmeye cüret edemem zira ben O'nun tasarısının bir aracıyım. Kendimden şüphe edersem Makine Tanrı'dan da şüphe etmiş olurum. Diyeceğimi dedim."
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette... O kadar uzun zamandır şüphelerle boğuşuyorum ki. Peki neden? Zihinsel melekelerimi kaybettiğim için mi düşünme yeteneğimi yitirdim? Ben âlim ve simyager Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs'um. Hermesih bana irfan ve kavrama yeteneği bahşetti. Şüphe etmeye cüret edemem zira ben O'nun tasarısının bir aracıyım. Kendimden şüphe edersem Makine Tanrı'dan da şüphe etmiş olurum. Diyeceğimi dedim."

languages.text: "Natürlich ... Ich wurde so lange von Zweifeln geplagt, aber warum? Habe ich neben meinem Verstand auch die Fähigkeit zu denken verloren? Ich bin Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, Weiser und Alchemist. Der Omnissiah gab mir das Wissen und die Fähigkeit, zu vergleichen, und ich wage nicht, zu zweifeln. Denn ich bin ein Teil Seines Plans, und wenn ich an mir selbst zweifle, zweifle ich am Maschinengott. Ich habe gesprochen."
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? I am Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, sage and alchemist. The Omnissiah has granted me knowledge and the ability to comprehend, and I dare not doubt. For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich ... Ich wurde so lange von Zweifeln geplagt, aber warum? Habe ich neben meinem Verstand auch die Fähigkeit zu denken verloren? Ich bin Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs, Weiser und Alchemist. Der Omnissiah gab mir das Wissen und die Fähigkeit, zu vergleichen, und ich wage nicht, zu zweifeln. Denn ich bin ein Teil Seines Plans, und wenn ich an mir selbst zweifle, zweifle ich am Maschinengott. Ich habe gesprochen."

languages.text: 「もちろん…。私は長らく疑念に苛まれてきた。だがなぜだ？正気を失ったがゆえに、考える力まで失ったというのか？私はジェネター・エクストレミス・エオガン・フェブラス、賢者にして錬金術師だ。オムニサイアは私に知識と理解する力を授けた、私は疑うことを許されない。なぜなら私は神の設計の導管であり、自らを疑うことは機械神を疑うことに等しいからだ。私は語り終えた。」
languages.original_text: "Of course... I have been plagued by doubt for so long, but why? Is it because I have lost my mind that I have lost my ability to think? For I am a conduit of His design, and if I doubt myself, I doubt the Machine God. I have spoken."
